mounting_bracket.note: plate thickness = 1.5x bolt dia; hole center >= 1.5x dia from any edge

shaft.note: fillet every diameter step; bearing seats sized to bearing ID at h6

bearing_seat.note: pocket dia = bearing OD + 0.05 slip / -0.02 press; depth = bearing width; keep a shoulder of 15% OD

gear.note: under 12 teeth undercuts; hub at least 1.8x bore for keyway strength

3d_print_fits.note: FDM holes shrink: drill or add 0.2 mm to any bore that must fit a shaft

strength_keywords.light: add lightening holes or pockets, keep 1.5x hole-dia webs between them
strength_keywords.stiff: prefer ribs over thickness: rib height 3x wall, thickness 0.6x wall
